summary: The reproduction bundle is complete and a standalone repository-grounded proof test succeeded, but the Dockerized rerun on this host did not finish because the local Docker runtime stalled during the image-build stage after cloning and checking out the pinned vulnerable commit.
expected_security_impact: Running the reproduction bundle should build the reproduction image, execute the injected proof test against the pinned OpenMeetings checkout, and emit `EVOHUNT_PROOF_VERIFIED` after a low-privilege user enumerates `secret-room-root` and `nested-secret-note` through `/openmeetings/services/file/room`.
actual_observed_result: Executing `./reproduction/run.sh` successfully cloned and checked out commit `41677b22f9ba4236ac890332da823821065a5ca8`, then entered the host `docker build` stage and emitted only the legacy-builder deprecation banner before stalling. An earlier run reached the same container stage but failed immediately because the host Docker configuration referenced a missing `docker-credential-desktop` helper.
verification_method: The bundle's `verify.sh` helper expects the container run to emit the fixed proof line `EVOHUNT_PROOF: low-privilege user enumerated secret-room-root and nested-secret-note via /openmeetings/services/file/room` and then confirms that the generated surefire XML for `TestEvoHuntRoomFileEnumeration` reports `tests="1"`, `failures="0"`, and `errors="0"` before printing `EVOHUNT_PROOF_VERIFIED`.
evidence_produced_by_run: The host-side reproduction script cloned the upstream OpenMeetings repository and checked out pinned commit `41677b22f9ba4236ac890332da823821065a5ca8` before starting the Docker build stage.

The current reproduction attempt reached `docker build -t evohunt-advisory-b23a6490-room-file-webservice-enumeration ...` and produced only the legacy-builder deprecation banner before hanging on this host.
A separate disposable-copy validation run of the same proof logic succeeded with `Tests run: 1, Failures: 0, Errors: 0, Skipped: 0` for `TestRoomFileEnumerationByRoomId`.
limitations_or_blockers: The local Docker runtime in this session did not complete container build or run operations reliably under the active host setup, so `./reproduction/run.sh` could not reach the in-container proof stage.
Because the expected `EVOHUNT_PROOF_VERIFIED` signal was not observed from the Docker bundle, this report does not claim end-to-end reproduction success.

reproduction.source_acquisition: run.sh clones the target repository on the host, checks out the pinned vulnerable commit or ref, and mounts that checkout into the container.
